description.value:
Counting rhymes used by river-auditors — Fjordmål river-auditors must calculate tolls in darkness, rain, and chaos; they inscribe their counting rhymes into their ledgers and, later, into implements, so the mind stays steady when the eye cannot.

Effect: Once per encounter, when a test you make would take a bane from poor lighting or distraction, you may ignore that bane.

Rules: Bane; Tests; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least quality craft; a river-auditor's ledger page inscribed with Fjordmål counting rhymes
